series_metadata.series_title: Daily Horse Racing Report (HR-53F, HR-53S, HR-53H)
series_metadata.series_description: This form is submitted daily by permit holders authorized to conduct parimutel betting on harness, quarterhorse, or thoroughbred horse racing. This form contains amount wagered, breakage, tax rates, and is accompained by the taxpayers remittance.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 5 years after the end of calendar year in which the report was filed. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain 5 years after the end of the calendar year in which the report was filed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
